channel.title: Atomization Energy on A.K.A λ
channel.description: Recent content in Atomization Energy on A.K.A λ

item.title: MLatomsENG
item.author: user@example.com (Anouar Akacha Delenda)
item.description:
Model Selection for Atomization Energy Prediction

In this work, I aim to span a various Machine Learning models; especially the regression ones. And the goal is to select the most promissing model that can predict in a smart fashion the Atomization energy of a given molecular structure. The Data can be found in the DataBase called GDB−13, also it is available under the name roboBohr as csv file format in kaggle's Dataset energy-molecule.
